prestazioni: Full bolt-on S58B30T0 (3.0L twin-turbo inline-6) Stage 2+ ECU flash by MSS Performance with custom dyno-tuned 22 psi peak boost map, ported and polished stock turbochargers (BMW part #7649870), and upgraded turbo inlets (Eventuri carbon fiber) for optimized airflow, targeting 650+ WHP on E85 blend (93 octane minimum).

Full titanium exhaust system by Akrapović Evolution Line (cat-back + downpipes) with 200-cell GESI catted downpipes (BMW-specific fitment), paired with a custom X-pipe resonator delete and secondary O2 sensor simulators (Motordyne) for aggressive backpressure reduction and 30% weight savings over stock.

Ohlins Road & Track coilovers (BMW G82-specific valving) with 800 lb/in front springs and 1000 lb/in rear springs, adjustable camber plates (034 Motorsport), and spherical bearing subframe collars (034 Motorsport) for chassis rigidity, paired with MCS 3-way adjustable dampers (remote reservoirs) for track use.
estetica: Full carbon fiber widebody conversion by Liberty Walk LB-WORKS (G82-specific kit), including extended front fenders (30mm wider), rear quarter panels (50mm wider), and custom carbon fiber rear diffuser with integrated titanium exhaust tips (Akrapović).

Custom front splitter by Varis Japan (G82 M4 GT-specific) with adjustable canards (RWB-style) and integrated air curtains, paired with a carbon fiber GT wing (AIT Racing) with 1,200mm span and 3D-printed titanium endplates for 400+ lbs of downforce at 120 mph.

Full interior overhaul with Recaro Pole Position seats (carbon fiber shells, FIA-approved), custom MCS roll cage (8-point, TIG-welded chromoly) with integrated fire suppression system (Lifeline Zero 360), and Alcantara-wrapped M4 GT Competition steering wheel (BMW Motorsport) with integrated AIM MXS Strada dash display.
